testcases.input: n = 20, rides = [[1,6,1],[3,10,2],[10,12,3],[11,12,2],[12,15,2],[13,18,1]] Output: 20 Explanation: We will pick up the following passengers: - Drive passenger 1 from point 3 to point 10 for a profit of 10 - 3 + 2 = 9 dollars. - Drive passenger 2 from point 10 to point 12 for a profit of 12 - 10 + 3 = 5 dollars. - Drive passenger 5 from point 13 to point 18 for a profit of 18 - 13 + 1 = 6 dollars. We earn 9 + 5 + 6 = 20 dollars in total.
